items.title: Purdue Heads to Pacific Northwest for Big Ten Championships
Polar Named USA Softball Top 25 Player of the Year Finalist
items.summary: Just days after earning Purdue's Female Athlete of the Year award, Moriah Polar becomes the first-ever Purdue softball player to be named to the USA Softball Top 25 Player of the Year finalist list.

items.title: This Week in Purdue Baseball | April 28, 2026
Baseball Hosts USI for Opener of 8-Game Homestand
items.summary: Purdue goes for its 10th victory of April & consecutive months with a double-figure win total

items.title: Boilermakers Add Guard Aysia Proctor
Boilermakers Place 3rd, Best B1G Finish Since 2019
Purdue at USC Game 3 Highlights
Boilers Suffer 1-0 Heartbreaker in Home Series Finale
items.summary: Purdue (32-18, 9-12 Big Ten) fell 1-0 in a pitcher’s duel to the Northwestern (27-19, 14-7 Big Ten) Wildcats on Sunday afternoon at Bittinger Stadium.

items.title: Purdue Held to Season-Low Run Total in 6-1 Loss
Purdue Moves Into 2nd at B1G Championships
Boilers Fall 11-4 on Senior Day
items.summary: Purdue (32-17, 9-11 Big Ten) fell 11-4 in game two of the series against Northwestern on senior day in West Lafayette.

items.title: Bases-Loaded Opportunities Go by the Board in 4-3 Loss at USC
items.summary: Van Assen retires 13 consecutive batters but Purdue kept off the scoreboard after the 2nd inning

items.title: Purdue at USC Game 1 Highlights
Despite Breaking 4 Records, Purdue Falls 8-7 to Northwestern
items.summary: Purdue (32-16, 9-10) falls 8-7 to Northwestern (25-19, 12-7) despite record-breaking performances in the series-opener.

items.title: Moore Named to NFCA DI National Freshman of the Year Top 25
items.summary: Purdue's Anna Moore was named to the 2026 NFCA D1 National Freshman of the Year list becoming the first freshman to earn the honor in the program's history.

items.title: Make Your Impact - Purdue Day of Giving on April 29
This Week in Purdue Baseball | April 22, 2026
Purdue Swimming & Diving Facilities Tour 2026
Purdue Hits 3 Homers in 6-5 Loss to Indiana State
Boilers Set 3 Records, Sweep the Day
items.summary: Purdue (32-15, 9-9 Big Ten) goes perfect on the day, beating UIC (12-2) and IU Indy (9-1) to extend their win streak to six-straight.
